summary: Added project instance tabs from Project Explorer for browsing reserving-class paths and project dataset types.
details: Project tree rows now include a View datasets icon that opens a top-level project instance tab titled with the project name.
Project instance tabs show a reserving-class path selector, a dataset type table, and floating in-tab dataset windows that reuse the existing Dataset Viewer page with project/path prefilled.

The reserving-class path selector preserves the server-provided hierarchy and level labels, uses the same node icon language as the shared path picker, and scrolls independently from the dataset table.
